prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KEYBOARDPS-BLU Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Keyboard Musical Toy Piano Lights and Sounds Kids Ages 3 and Up (Blue) Description: Is your child a budding rock star? Then this electronic keyboard toy from Kidplokio is a great gift idea for your little one. This toy piano features various music, tempo, rhythm, and playback sounds with recording and replayability so kids can practice and improve their musical skills.

This colorful musical keyboard toy introduces children to sounds, vibrant colors, and shapes that will help stimulate hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, and music cognition. Interactive musical toys are wonderful options for educational development while encouraging creativity and imagination.

The Kidplokio toy keyboard features 24 individual musical keys, 8 instrument buttons, animal noise buttons, record and demo buttons, 4 rhythm buttons, and flashing lights as well as an easy-to-use on/off switch. It also comes with volume control buttons so parents can control the volume as needed.

Perfect for traveling and playing music on the go, this kid's piano organ toy features a sturdy top handle with an ergonomic grip so they can take it to playdates, slumber parties, and road trips. Made of durable, high-quality plastic, you can count on this toy to last through many musical concerts and performances. It's battery-operated so you don't need to worry about charging or plugging in. Search Terms: baby musical toys musical toys for toddlers 3 to 5 toy piano music toys kids pianos kids keyboards girls piano toys girls keyboard toys kids dress up and pretend play for toddlers 3 to 5 playsets for backyard indoor girls toys indoor music toys Features: - MUSICAL LEARNING TOY - Kidplokio electronic keyboard piano is a great interactive musical toy for young rock stars; Features a variety of rhythm, music, tempo, and playback sounds, with recording and replay-ability so children can practice and improve their musical skills - EDUCATIONAL DEVELOPMENT - Colorful musical keyboard toy introduces little ones to sounds, vibrant colors, and shapes that stimulate hand-eye coordination, music cognition, and fine motor skills - KEYBOARD MUSICAL TOY FEATURES - Keyboard comes with 24 musical keys, 3D lights and an easy-to-use on/off switch - PERFECT FOR TRAVEL - Kids organ piano toy comes with a sturdy travel handle so they can take it on the go to playdates, slumber parties, and road trips; Made of durable, high-quality plastic that will stand up to little kids' use; Battery operated so no worrying about charging or plugging in - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic; Colors: assorted (red, blue, or pink); Requires 3x 1.5V "AA" batteries (not included); Dimensions: 14" length; Recommended age: 3 years and up (choking hazard, small parts) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
